name: CompensationEngine

ironRules.rule: compensationStack executed in REVERSE order (LIFO) — [...stack].reverse() before iteration. Not insertion order, not parallel. CF-19-2.
Serial execution only — for..of loop, no Promise.all, no concurrent compensation. Parallel execution creates race conditions. CF-19-2.
SETNX(comp-lock:{sagaId}:{stepIndex}) BEFORE compensation body per step — idempotent crash restart prevents double-execution (double-refund risk). CF-19-2.
stop-on-first-failure: any compensation step failure → emit CompensationFailed with failedStep, HALT immediately. Do NOT continue to remaining steps. CF-19-2.
storeDocument(compensationRecord) BEFORE enqueue(CompensationStepExecuted) per step — DNA-8 outbox pattern.

keywords: CompensationEngine LIFO serial stop-on-first-failure idempotent restart SETNX comp-lock T622 CF-19-2 compensationStack reverse no parallel
